HOW IT WORKS
1
Share your unique referral link by text, email, or social media.
2
Your friend signs up through your link and uses code REFER10 at checkout for $10 off.
3
After 30 days on an active paid plan, we verify and send $10 cash to the registered adult via Venmo or PayPal on the 1st.
4
Under 18? A parent or legal guardian must register the payout method and claim the reward. We cannot pay minors directly.
SET UP YOUR PAYOUT
Email with your name, Venmo or PayPal handle, and the subject line "Referral Payout Setup" to register your payout method before your first referral is confirmed.

Parents claiming on behalf of a minor: include your child's account email and your relationship to them.
📖 LIFE OS TUTORIAL
Tap any section below — or use Next › to go step by step
Step 1 of 19

👋 Welcome to Life OS

Life OS is a complete personal command center for young people — and a powerful management tool for parents. Everything saves automatically. No accounts needed. Let's explore every corner of it.

Where you are right now
🌐 Language·👤 Child Login·👨‍👩‍👧 Parent·⚙ Settings→☰ Menu
These 5 buttons at the top are your main controls. On mobile they appear in a row just below the LIFE OS title bar.
☰
Menu — how you get anywhere Tap the ☰ hamburger icon to open the navigation sidebar. All 20+ sections are listed with emoji icons. Tap any one to jump there instantly.
💾
Everything saves automatically You never need to tap Save. Every change you make is saved to your device instantly. Use Settings → Backup to export a copy as a safety net.
❓
? buttons are everywhere Throughout the app, you'll see small ? buttons. Tap one for an instant explanation of exactly what that section does.
👨‍👩‍👧
Parents: set up first If you're a parent, tap the Parent button at the top → Manage Users → add each child with a 4-digit PIN before your kids log in.
👤
Kids: use Child Login Tap the 👤 Child Login button at the top, find your name, and enter your 4-digit PIN to access your personal dashboard.

🏠 Dashboard — Your Home Base

The Dashboard is the first thing you see. It gives you a snapshot of everything important — updated live as you use the app.

How to get here
☰ Menu→🏠 Dashboard
📊
Quick Stats Bar Shows your Bank balance, Savings, total Goals, GPA, and Streak — all pulled live from your data. Tap any stat to jump to that section.
🔥
Streak Counter Your streak goes up when you complete 4+ daily habits in a day. It resets to zero if you miss a full day — so check in every day!
🟢
Dashboard card colors Every card on your dashboard has a colored bar at the top. Green means you're on track. Yellow means there's room to improve or you haven't started yet. Red means something needs attention. Everything starts green — you earn your way to red by falling behind.
✝️
Scripture Banner A Bible verse rotates automatically every 60 seconds. Tap › to skip ahead. You can turn this off in Settings if your family doesn't use faith features.
💬
Daily Prompt A new journaling question appears each day. Tap it to open your Journal with that prompt pre-loaded — just start typing.
🎨
Make it yours Open Settings → Appearance to choose from 10 background styles and 10 accent colors. Light mode and dark mode are both available.
✏️
Edit your name Click directly on your name at the top of the dashboard to edit it inline, or change it in Settings → Profile.
🔄
Using on multiple devices or browsers LifeOS saves data to this browser only by default. To access your data on another browser or device: go to Settings → Data Management → Export Backup, save the file, then open LifeOS on the other browser and use Import to load it. Do this regularly to keep devices in sync.

✅ Daily Habits — Your Daily W's

The most important thing to do every single day. Check off your habits to build a streak and earn points toward your Life Score.

Where to find it
🏠 Dashboard→Daily W's card
✅
How to check in Tap any habit tile to mark it complete for today. It turns green with a checkmark ✓ and locks until midnight automatically.
🔥
Building your streak Complete 4 or more habits in a single day to count as a "streak day." Your streak number is shown on your dashboard. Miss a full day and the streak resets to 0.
➕
Add your own habit Tap the "+ Habit" button at the bottom of the Daily W's card. Give it a name and pick an emoji — it'll appear in your grid every day from now on.
🙏
Built-in habits Includes: Prayer, Bible reading, workout, drink water, no doom-scrolling, journal, study, and gratitude. Faith habits can be toggled off in Settings.
📊
Why it matters Habit completion feeds directly into your Life Score (visible to parents in the Parent Hub). The more consistent you are, the better your score.

💰 Money Manager

Learn how to handle money before you have a lot of it. Track balances, bills, expenses, and savings goals — just like a real adult budget.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→💰 Money
🏦
Overview tab Enter your Checking and Savings balances here. They show on your dashboard instantly. A chart tracks your history every time you update your balance.
🧾
Bills tab Add recurring bills — name, amount, and due date. Tap a bill to mark it paid for the month. Total owed calculates automatically. Unpaid count shows on your dashboard.
💳
Transactions tab Log every income or expense with a category (food, gas, fun, etc.). Filter by type. Monthly totals auto-calculate. Watch your Net Left Over number.
🎯
Savings Goals tab Create goals with a name, emoji, target amount, and current savings. Progress bars show exactly how close you are. Tap to quick-add money toward a goal.
📋
Budget Planner tab Enter your monthly income and the 50/30/20 rule calculates automatically — 50% needs, 30% wants, 20% savings. Shows a warning if your bills exceed 50%.
📚
Finance Education tab Real financial education — taxes, retirement accounts (IRA/401k), self-employment taxes, and a quick tax estimator. Knowledge that schools don't teach.

📚 School Tracker

Stay on top of every class, every assignment, and every grade — all in one organized place.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→📚 School
📖
My Classes tab Tap "+ Add Class" to add each subject with teacher name, room number, and grade percentage. Grade letter and GPA update instantly as you type.
📝
Assignments tab Add every homework, test, and project with a due date and priority (High/Medium/Low). Color-coded by urgency — red means high priority. Overdue tasks show a red warning badge. Tap the checkbox when done.
🎓
GPA tab Live GPA calculated from all your class grades. Shows honor roll status and a visual breakdown by class. Updates the moment you change any grade.
⏱
Study Timer tab Set a Pomodoro timer — pick 25, 45, 60, or 90 minutes, name what you're studying, and start. Every session is automatically logged with subject, date, and duration.
📊
Study Log tab See all your past study sessions in a list with total time studied per subject. Shows patterns in your study habits over time.

📅 Schedule Planner

A 28-day visual calendar grid that maps your whole week visually so you can see exactly where your time goes.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→📅 Schedule
🗓
The grid A 28-day calendar from 6 AM to 11 PM. Each row is a time slot. Click any cell to assign an activity to that time. Cells color-code automatically by activity type.
🎨
Activity colors School = blue, Sleep = dark, Work = green, Exercise = orange, Faith = purple, Free time = teal. Each activity gets its own consistent color in the grid.
➕
Custom activities Go to Settings → Schedule Activities to add your own activity types with custom names and colors. They'll appear as options when you click any cell.
👁
Why use it? When you see your week laid out visually, you can spot where you're wasting time, when to study, and how to balance school, sleep, and fun.

❤️ Health & Fitness

Track your physical health, nutrition, mood, and habits over time. Your body is your most important long-term investment.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→❤️ Health
⚖️
Weight Tracker Log your weight and see a chart of your progress over time. Completely private — only you can see it. Set a goal weight for motivation.
🥗
Nutrition Log Log meals with calories, protein, carbs, and fat. Daily totals calculate automatically. Color indicators show if you're over or under your targets.
😊
Mood Check-In Rate your mood from 1–5 and add a note about your day. Mood charts over time show patterns — great for noticing what affects how you feel.
💪
Fitness Habits Workout, stretch, water intake — track these alongside your daily habits. Consistent fitness entries boost your Life Score's Wellbeing category.

🎯 Goals & Vision

Where big dreams get turned into real plans. Set goals, track progress, and explore potential careers.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🎯 Goals
📝
Life Vision Start by writing your personal vision statement — who do you want to be? This is private and just for you. Keep it updated as you grow.
📅
Goal Timeline Add goals for 1 year, 3 years, 5 years, and 10 years out. Pick a category (Education, Career, Health, etc.) and tap the circle to mark a goal achieved.
💼
Career Explorer Browse 35+ real careers with salary ranges, education requirements, and day-in-the-life descriptions. Tap the star to save careers you're interested in.
🏆
Milestones Record achievements that matter to you — awards, personal bests, proud moments. These build your life story and can go into your resume or bio page later.

🧠 Life Skills Academy

140+ lessons teaching everything schools don't — from cooking and budgeting to car care and mental health. Earn real certificates.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🧠 Life Skills
📂
16 Categories Cooking, Car Care, Money, Taxes, Home Maintenance, Communication, Mental Health, Relationships, Faith, Digital Safety, First Aid, and more. Each category has multiple lessons.
📖
How to learn Tap any lesson card to open the full guide. Read through it — guides are written in plain language, designed to be easy to understand even if you've never heard of the topic before.
📝
Earn Certificates After completing all lessons in a category, take a 5-question quiz. Score 80% or higher and you earn a shareable, printable certificate for that category.
🏅
Achievement Badges Earning 3 certificates unlocks a special badge in the Badges section. Completing all 16 categories is one of the hardest achievements in the whole app.

🌱 Growing Up

Real, honest guides for the stuff that's hard to talk about. Age-filtered and written with respect and care.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🌱 Growing Up
🧬
Puberty & Body Changes Honest, age-appropriate guides for both guys and girls. What to expect, what's normal, and how to handle the physical and emotional changes.
🧠
Mental Health Guides on anxiety, depression, stress, and self-worth — written to be understood by teens. Includes coping strategies and when to ask for help.
💬
Relationships & Social Life Friendship, boundaries, pressure, dating basics — all handled thoughtfully with guidance that respects different family values.
🆘
Crisis Resources always visible The 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline and Crisis Text Line (741741) are always displayed at the top of this section — no matter what age filter is set.
🔒
Parents: age filtering Content is filtered by the child's life stage setting. You can review all content in Settings and adjust what's visible for your child's age.

✍️ Journal

A private space to write, reflect, and process your thoughts. 100% private — nobody else can read your journal.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→✍️ Journal
📝
Writing an entry Pick a category (Gratitude, Goals, Reflection, etc.), write your entry in the box, and tap Save. Each entry is stamped with the date and time automatically.
📂
Saved entries All past entries appear below the writing area. Tap any entry to read it again. You can filter entries by category to find what you're looking for.
💬
Daily prompts The Dashboard shows a new journaling prompt every day. Tap it and it opens your Journal with that prompt already filled in — just add your thoughts.
📊
Life Score connection The more journal entries you write, the higher your Engagement score in the Life Score report. Parents can see the count — but NOT the content.

✝️ Bible & Faith

A complete daily Bible reading and devotional system — optional for families who use faith features.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→✝️ Scripture
📖
Daily Verse A new Bible verse every day, organized by monthly theme. Tap the calendar to see the full year's plan. Earn 5 points for reading each day — they add to your streak points.
📚
Devotionals Short guided reflections — read the passage, consider the questions, and write a response. Great for personal growth or family discussions.
🙏
Faith Guides Deeper guides on prayer, purpose, identity, and what the Bible says about real-life topics teens actually face.
⚙️
Turn it off/on Go to Settings → Content to toggle faith features on or off. When off, scripture sections are completely hidden. This setting is per-profile.

🚗 Driving

Everything needed to go from "no license" to "road confident" — not just the permit test, but actual driving life.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🚗 Driving
📋
License Prep Full permit test study guide with interactive practice questions. Log practice driving hours (most states require 40-60 hours) — the tracker shows your progress toward the required total.
🔧
Car Maintenance Interactive checklist for everything your car needs — oil changes, tire pressure, air filters, and more. Learn what each thing is, why it matters, and how often to do it.
💰
Costs & Insurance Real numbers on what a car actually costs — insurance, gas, registration, maintenance. Eye-opening for teens who think they can afford a car on a part-time job.
🚨
Accident Procedures Step-by-step what to do if you're in an accident — who to call, what to say, what to photograph, and how insurance claims work.

🏆 Sports

14 sport profiles covering athletic development, scholarships, health risks, and what it really takes to go to the next level.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🏆 Sports
⚽
14 Sports covered Football, basketball, baseball, soccer, volleyball, track, swimming, wrestling, softball, tennis, golf, lacrosse, gymnastics, and cross country. Filter by Boys, Girls, or Both.
🎓
Scholarship Info Each sport profile includes real scholarship statistics — how many athletes get recruited, average scholarship amounts, and what recruiters look for.
❤️
Health & Safety Common injuries, prevention tips, and the mental health challenges specific to each sport. Includes concussion protocols and overtraining warning signs.
📈
Development Tips Off-season training advice, what college coaches actually want to see, and the realistic odds at each competition level (JV → Varsity → College → Pro).

🏅 Badges & Achievements

20 achievements to unlock by doing real things across the app. Badges make progress visible and keep things fun.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→🏅 Badges
🔓
How to unlock badges Each badge has a specific requirement — like a 7-day streak, completing your first Life Skills certificate, writing 10 journal entries, or finishing all your goals for the year.
📊
Badge gallery Locked badges show as grey silhouettes so you can see what's possible. Earned badges display in full color with the date you unlocked them.
🏆
Parent visibility Parents can see your badge count in the Parent Hub Overview. Earning badges improves your Engagement score in the Life Score system.
🎯
Challenge yourself Try to earn all 20 badges. Some are easy (first login, first journal entry) and some take months of consistent effort. The rarest ones are real accomplishments.

💼 Jobs, Resume & Bio

Build a real resume, track job applications, and create a shareable personal bio page — all before you're 18.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→📄 Jobs / Resume·🪪 Bio Page
📄
Resume Builder Fill in your education, experience, skills, and activities. Choose from professional, modern, or creative templates. Download as a formatted resume ready to send to employers.
📋
Job Tracker Track every job you've applied for — company, position, date applied, status (applied, interview, offer, rejected). Never lose track of where you've applied.
🎤
Interview Prep Practice common interview questions with the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result). Write out your answers and review them before any interview.
🪪
Bio Page Build a shareable personal page with your photo, skills, interests, and accomplishments. Gets a shareable link you can send to coaches, colleges, or employers.

✅ Chores & Rewards System

The motivation engine of Life OS. Complete chores → earn Parent Bucks → redeem prizes. Here's how the whole system works from both sides.

Where to find it
☰ Menu→✅ Chores·🪙 Parent Bucks·📱 Screen Time
✅
For Kids — Chores tab Your parent assigns chores here. Each chore shows the name, point value, and how often it repeats. Finish the real chore, then tap "Mark Done." Your parent verifies it and you get paid.
🪙
Parent Bucks Virtual currency you earn by completing chores and good behavior. Check your balance in the Parent Bucks section. Tap Prize Store to see what you can spend them on.
📱
Screen Time Earn screen time minutes through chores. Go to Screen Time → tap Use Time → start the countdown. When time runs out, the timer stops. Parents top up your balance.
🎰
Bonus rewards — Wheel & Scratch Cards The Chores section has a Spin the Wheel and Scratch Card feature. Spin once per day for a chance at bonus Parent Bucks. Scratch cards are awarded by parents for special achievements.
👨‍👩‍👧
For Parents — setup in Parent Hub Go to Parent Hub → Chores & Deeds to create chores and set point values. Prize Store is where you add items for kids to redeem. Screen Time tab is where you add/reset time balances.

👨‍👩‍👧 Parent Hub

Your private control center — PIN-protected. Everything you need to guide and monitor each child's progress.

How to access
👨‍👩‍👧 Parent button→Enter 6-digit PIN→Parent Hub opens
👥
Manage Users First thing to set up. Add each child with a name and 4-digit PIN. From here you can also reset a child's PIN if they forget it, and toggle whether YOUR parent PIN is required every time you open the hub.
📊
Overview — Life Score Select a child from the dropdown at the top. See their Life Score (A+ to F) across 6 categories: Academics, Responsibility, Growth, Wellbeing, Character, Engagement. Updates in real time.
📋
Behavior & Grades tab Log positive notes ("Did homework without being asked") and areas to work on. Each entry affects their Life Score. Builds a record you can reference in real conversations.
🏆
Contests tab Create family competitions — first to reach a streak, most chores in a month, etc. Adds a fun competitive layer if you have multiple kids.
📈
Activity Log See a history of what your child has been doing in the app — lessons completed, journal entries written, badges earned. Great for weekly check-ins.
←
Going back Use the "← Dashboard" button at the top of the Parent Hub to return to the main app screen at any time.
⚠️ Important — Per-Child Section Control
You control what each child sees. Every child can have different sections enabled or disabled — perfect for different ages. A 9-year-old doesn't need Resume Builder or Money Manager, but a 16-year-old does. Go to Parent Hub → Controls → 🧩 Child Section Access, pick a child, then toggle sections on or off. Changes take effect immediately.

⚙️ Settings, Language & Power Tips

The final tools that make Life OS feel completely personal — and a few pro moves to get the most out of everything.

Where to find it
⚙ Settings button·🌐 Language button→both in the top bar
🌐
Language translation Tap the 🌐 Language button. Select any language from the list — the ENTIRE app translates instantly. All text, buttons, labels, everything. Tap Language again and choose English to switch back.
⚙️
Settings — Profile tab Change your name, pick your grade/life stage (Elementary, Middle School, High School, etc.), and toggle faith features on or off. Life stage controls which sections are visible.
🎨
Settings — Appearance tab Pick from 10 background themes and 10 accent colors. Switch between Light and Dark mode. Changes apply instantly — experiment freely.
💾
Settings — Data tab Tap Export Backup to save your entire life's data as a .json file. Keep it in your photos or cloud drive. Import it anytime to restore everything exactly as it was.
📱
Pro tip — Add to Home Screen In your mobile browser, tap Share → "Add to Home Screen." Life OS works like a real app right from your home screen, no app store needed.
🔄
Re-open this tutorial anytime Go to ⚙ Settings → tap "How to Use Life OS — Full Tutorial." You can also re-open the Quick Start wizard from the Settings menu anytime.
1 / 19
💚 SAVINGS GOAL
📖 ADD CLASS
📅 ADD EVENT
🎯 ADD GOAL
🔥 ADD TO FUEL WALL
✦ My Life Vision

Describe the person you want to become — your character, your impact, your legacy. This isn't about specific goals — it's about identity. Who are you becoming?

📅 1-Year Goals

What do you want to have accomplished in the next year?

👤
Set Up Your Profile
Personalize your Life OS experience
Your Name
Sex
Age Range
Education Level
Parent / Guardian
👨‍👧 Parent / Guardian Signup
Setting this up for your child? Turn this on.
🎨 LOGO MAKER
None 🎵 ✝️ ⚡ 🎓 💻 🎨 💪 🏀 📸
✨ Start Here!
👆
👶
FIRST THING FIRST
Add your child now so they can log in on their own device. It only takes 10 seconds.
  • 1
    You're already in the Parent Hub. Click 👥 Manage Users in the left menu.
  • 2
    Type your child's name in the Child's Name field and tap 👶 Add Child. A 4-digit PIN is auto-generated — write it down.
  • 3
    Repeat for each child. Then share their PIN so they can tap 👤 Child Login at the top of the screen.
💡 Already added your kids? Tap Next to continue the setup guide.
👋
WELCOME TO LIFE OS
Your family's complete command center. This quick guide will have your whole family up and running in just a few minutes.
👨‍👩‍👧
Parent Hub
Your private control center — PIN protected so only you can access it.
👤
Child Profiles
Each kid gets their own 4-digit PIN and completely separate dashboard.
🧠
140+ Lessons
Life skills from cooking to budgeting. Kids earn real certificates.
✅
Chores & Rewards
Assign chores with point values. Kids earn Parent Bucks and screen time.
💡 Tip: This whole guide takes about 2 minutes. You can reopen it anytime from Settings.
🚀
STEP 1 — SET UP YOUR FAMILY
Before your kids can log in, you need to add them. Here's how:
  • 1
    Tap the 👨‍👩‍👧 Parent button at the top of the screen to open the Parent Hub.
  • 2
    You'll be asked to create a 6-digit Parent PIN — this keeps your parent controls private from the kids.
  • 3
    Once inside, go to 👥 Manage Users on the left side menu.
  • 4
    Tap "+ Add Child" and type your child's name. A 4-digit PIN will be created — write it down or share it with your child.
  • 5
    Repeat for each child in your family. You can add as many as you need!
💡 Each child has their own private space. When a child logs in, they only see their own data — not their siblings'.
🔐
YOUR PARENT HUB
Everything you need to guide and monitor your kids — all in one place.
📊
Overview
See your child's Life Score — a real grade (A+ to F) across 6 life categories.
✅
Chores & Deeds
Create and assign chores. Kids complete them and earn Parent Bucks.
📱
Screen Time
Kids earn screen time by completing chores. You control the balance.
📋
Behavior Log
Record positive moments and areas to work on. Feeds into their Life Score.
📈
Report Card
Weekly snapshot of each child's progress across every section.
🎮
Prize Store
Build a custom reward store — kids spend their Parent Bucks here.
💡 Back button: Use the ← Dashboard button inside the Parent Hub to return to the main screen anytime.
⭐
CHORES & REWARDS
The most powerful motivation system you'll ever use at home.
  • 1
    Go to Parent Hub → Chores & Deeds. Tap "+ Add Chore" and give it a name, point value, and how often it repeats (daily, weekly, one-time).
  • 2
    Your child will see the chore in their ✅ Chores section. When they finish it, they tap "Mark Done".
  • 3
    You verify it in the Parent Hub. Once approved, they earn Parent Bucks 🪙 and Screen Time ⏱ automatically.
  • 4
    Build a Prize Store — add prizes like "Movie Night", "Extra Screen Time", or real rewards. Kids spend their Parent Bucks to claim them.
💡 Fun extras: Your kids can also spin a reward wheel 🎰 or scratch a virtual card 🎫 to win bonus Parent Bucks!
⚙️
SETTINGS & LANGUAGE
Make Life OS feel like it was built for your family.
  • 🌐
    Language: Tap the 🌐 Language button at the top. Pick any language from the list and the ENTIRE app translates instantly. Tap again and choose English to switch back.
  • ⚙
    Settings: Tap ⚙ Settings in the top bar. Change your name, pick a color theme, show or hide sections your family doesn't need, and back up your data.
  • 🎨
    Themes: Inside Settings → Appearance, choose from 10 background styles and 10 accent colors to match your family's vibe.
  • 💾
    Backup: Inside Settings → Data, tap Export Backup to save your family data as a file. Keep it safe — import it anytime to restore everything.
💡 Faith features: Bible verses, devotionals, and scripture sections can be toggled on or off in Settings for families of all backgrounds.
🎉
YOU'RE ALL SET!
Here's your quick-start checklist to get the whole family going today.
  • ✓
    Open Parent Hub → Manage Users → Add each child with a 4-digit PIN
  • ✓
    Share each child's PIN with them and have them tap 👤 Child Login
  • ✓
    Add at least 3 chores in Parent Hub → Chores & Deeds
  • ✓
    Build a Prize Store with at least 1 reward your kid will want
  • ✓
    Open the Full Tutorial below to explore every single section in detail
Skip for now
🌟
HEY! WELCOME!
Life OS is YOUR personal command center. Let's take a super quick tour so you know exactly where everything is!
📊
Your Dashboard
Your home base — streaks, stats, and your daily wins all in one spot.
✅
Daily Habits
Check off habits every day to build your streak. Miss a day = streak reset!
🧠
Life Skills
140+ lessons with real certificates you can print. Learn stuff that actually matters.
🪙
Earn Rewards
Finish chores → earn Parent Bucks → spend them on prizes in the store!
💡 This is YOUR space. Your data is private — your parents can't see your journal entries!
🧭
HOW TO GET AROUND
Everything in Life OS is organized into sections. Here's how to navigate:
  • ☰
    Tap the ☰ menu button in the top-right corner to open the navigation. All your sections are listed there with emojis.
  • 🏠
    Tap 🏠 Dashboard at the top of the menu to return home anytime from anywhere in the app.
  • ❓
    See a ? button anywhere? Tap it! It gives you a quick explanation of exactly what that section does.
  • ⚙
    Tap ⚙ Settings in the quick bar to change your name, pick your grade level, choose a color theme, and more.
💡 Lost? Just tap ☰ → Dashboard and you'll always get back home!
🔥
DAILY HABITS & STREAKS
This is the #1 thing to check every single day.
  • 1
    On your Dashboard, find the Daily W's card. These are your habits — things like drinking water, praying, studying, working out.
  • 2
    Tap each habit to check it off with a ✅. The habit turns green and locks until midnight.
  • 3
    Complete 4 or more habits in a day to count it as a streak day. Your streak number shows at the top.
  • 4
    Want to add your own habit? Tap the + Habit button and create a custom one with your own emoji!
🔥 Challenge: Try to build a 7-day streak in your first week. You'll unlock your first badge!
💰
CHORES & EARNING REWARDS
The more you do, the more you earn. Here's how it works:
  • 1
    Tap ✅ Chores in the menu. Your parent has added chores for you with point values.
  • 2
    Finish a chore in real life, then tap "Mark Done" in the app. Your parent will verify it.
  • 3
    Once approved, you earn 🪙 Parent Bucks and ⏱ Screen Time automatically!
  • 4
    Tap 🪙 Parent Bucks to see your balance and visit the Prize Store — spend your bucks on prizes your parent added.
  • 5
    Check the 🎰 Wheel and 🎫 Scratch Card tabs for bonus ways to earn extra Parent Bucks!
📚
SCHOOL & LIFE SKILLS
Two sections that help you actually get smarter — for real life, not just class.
  • 📖
    School section: Add your classes and grades — your GPA calculates automatically! Track assignments by due date so you never miss a deadline.
  • ⏱
    Study Timer: In the School section, tap Study Timer. Set a Pomodoro timer (25 min focused work) and it logs every session automatically.
  • 🧠
    Life Skills Academy: Find this in the menu. 140+ lessons on cooking, budgeting, car care, mental health, and more. Complete a category to earn a printable certificate!
  • 🏅
    Badges: Check the Badges section to see what achievements you've unlocked and what challenges are still left to complete.
🎓 Pro tip: Earn 3 Life Skills certificates and unlock a special badge!
🚀
YOU'VE GOT THIS!
You're ready to start. Here are your first 3 missions:
  • 🎯
    Go to ⚙ Settings and set your name and pick a color theme you like
  • 🎯
    Check off all your Daily Habits today to start your streak
  • 🎯
    Complete your first chore and earn your first Parent Bucks 🪙
💡 Remember: Tap the ☰ menu to explore ALL sections — there are 20+ areas to discover!
Skip for now
✝️ TODAY'S DEVOTIONAL
💭 Reflection
🎯 Apply It Today
🙏 Prayer
